channel.title: IndexRidge geospatial data updates
channel.description: IndexRidge paid GeoTIFF sample product updates.

item.title: IndexRidge UK Agricultural NDVI GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDVI vegetation GeoTIFF sample layer with source metadata and processing notes. AI-assisted automation was involved in collation; not checked by a human operator.

item.title: IndexRidge UK Agricultural NDMI Moisture GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDMI moisture GeoTIFF sample for UK agricultural GIS and crop-stress workflow testing. AI-assisted automation was involved in collation; not checked by a human operator.

item.title: IndexRidge UK Floodplain NDWI Water GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDWI water-index GeoTIFF sample for UK floodplain/wetness GIS workflow testing. AI-assisted automation was involved in collation; not checked by a human operator.

item.title: IndexRidge UK Urban NDBI Built-Surface GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDBI built-surface GeoTIFF sample for UK urban GIS and land-use workflow testing. AI-assisted automation was involved in collation; not checked by a human operator.

item.title: IndexRidge Global Agriculture NDVI California GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDVI vegetation GeoTIFF sample for global agricultural GIS and crop-monitoring workflow testing, using a California Central Valley AOI. AI-assisted automation was involved in collation; not checked by a human operator.

item.title: IndexRidge Global Irrigated Agriculture NDMI Nile Delta GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDMI moisture GeoTIFF sample for global irrigated-agriculture and crop-stress GIS workflow testing, using a Nile Delta AOI. AI-assisted automation was involved in collation; not checked by a human operator.

item.title: IndexRidge Global Water Body NDWI Lake Mead GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDWI water-index GeoTIFF sample for global water-body and reservoir GIS workflow testing, using a Lake Mead AOI. AI-assisted automation was involved in collation; not checked by a human operator.

item.title: IndexRidge Global Urban NDBI Dubai Built-Surface GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDBI built-surface GeoTIFF sample for global urban analytics and land-use GIS workflow testing, using a Dubai AOI. AI-assisted automation was involved in collation; not checked by a human operator.
